plannerContext: Public marketing website for CaseSift (live at https://casesift.co.uk). Stack: Next.js 15 App Router, React 19, TypeScript (strict mode), Tailwind CSS v4, Radix UI primitives, Lucide icons, Sonner toasts. Deployed on Vercel. Static-export-friendly (no server-side dependencies, no auth, no DB). Single long landing page at src/app/page.tsx with sections: hero, problem/solution, how-it-works, case types, report preview, statistics, pricing, testimonials, trust & security, FAQ, contact. SEO baseline already in place: src/app/layout.tsx has Metadata API config (title, description, keywords, OpenGraph, Twitter card, metadataBase, locale=en_GB), src/app/robots.ts disallows /dashboard, /cases, /settings, /sign-in, /sign-up, src/app/sitemap.ts exposes the homepage. Security headers in next.config.ts (X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options DENY, X-XSS-Protection, Referrer-Policy, Strict-Transport-Security with preload, Permissions-Policy). NO tests configured yet (no Vitest, no Playwright). NO CI configured yet (no .github/workflows/). Backend (FSM engine, API, dashboard app) lives in a SEPARATE private repo (CaseSift backend) — do not plan changes that depend on backend code from this adapter. The FSM kernel lives at Startup/FSM/ (parent of this repo) and is shared with the casesift backend adapter.
